mapper.sql: id, tier_name, tier_value, tier_sort, status, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, remark, is_deleted
mapper.select:
select
from t_live_user_tier_config where is_deleted = 0 and status = 1 order by tier_sort asc, id asc
select id, tier_name as name, tier_value as value from t_live_user_tier_config where is_deleted = 0 and status = 1 order by tier_sort asc, id asc

select
from t_live_user_tier_config where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
update t_live_user_tier_config
tier_name = #{tierName},
tier_value = #{tierValue},
tier_sort = #{tierSort},
status = #{status},
create_by = #{createBy},
update_by = #{updateBy},
remark = #{remark},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into t_live_user_tier_config (tier_name, tier_value, tier_sort, status, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, remark, is_deleted) values (#{tierName}, #{tierValue}, #{tierSort}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, now(), now(), #{remark}, #{isDeleted})
